body.raw:
{
  "name": "Twitter User Tweets Scraper (2)",
  "concurrency": 1,
  "export_unique_results": true,
  "to_complete": false,
  "no_line_breaks": true,
  "params": {
"json": true,
"hours_back": null,
"max_results": 98,
"exclude_reposts": true,
"collect_pinned_tweets": true
  }
}

request.description:
These `params` control how the **Twitter Profile Scraper** behaves — specifically whether to return parsed fields or the raw API response.

➡️ These parameters are specific to the **Twitter Profile Scraper**. _Refer to the_ [Constructing the `params` Object](#13eb068f-2bae-4603-941e-9f36038fb379) _section to understand how to format and apply them._

| Parameter | Type| Description|
| --------- | ------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| **json**  | boolean | If `true`, returns the complete raw JSON payload for the user profile, before any internal data parsing. |

response.name: Example

request.description:
These `result` objects extend those from the [Twitter Profile Scraper](#eedf17a4-eedf-477d-ba15-93e11a9ab4ac) with tweet-specific fields:

| **Field** | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **content** | string | Full text of the tweet. |
| **_json** | object | Raw JSON payload for the tweet, before any parsing. |
| **published_at** | string (ISO) | When the tweet was originally posted. |
| **scraping_time** | string (ISO) | When this tweet was fetched by the scraper. |
| **tweet_url** | string | Direct URL to the tweet on Twitter. |
| **original_tweet_id** | string | ID of the quoted tweet, if this is a quote. |
| **original_tweet_url** | string | URL of the quoted tweet, if applicable. |
| **likes** | integer | Number of likes (favorites) the tweet has received. |
| **retweet_count** | integer | Number of times the tweet was retweeted. |
| **reply_count** | integer | Number of replies to the tweet. |
| **quote_count** | integer | Number of quote-tweets. |
| **bookmarks_count** | integer | Number of times the tweet was bookmarked. |
| **views_count** | integer | Impressions or view count for the tweet. |
| **is_retweeted** | boolean | `true` if this record represents a retweet. |
| **is_quoted** | boolean | `true` if this record represents a quote-tweet. |
| **is_pinned** | boolean | `true` if this tweet is pinned on the user’s profile. |
| **in_reply_to_status_id_str** | string or null | Tweet ID that this tweet replies to, if any. |
| **in_reply_to_user_id_str** | string or null | User ID of the tweet this one replies to. |
| **in_reply_to_screen_name** | string or null | Screen name of the tweet this one replies to. |
| **media_0_url**, **media_1_url**, … | string or null | URLs of attached media items (images, videos), if any. |
| **binded_media_title**, **binded_media_domain**, **binded_media_thumbnail_url**, etc. | string or null | Data about any Twitter Card or embedded media (card title, domain, thumbnail, link). |

response.name: Example
